ValidationRule.description: Fund is mandatory when DD focus is equal to DD Product and non mandatory when DD Focus is equal to DD Corporate
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "RFP_RFI_Questionnaire", NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Focus__c, "DD Corporate"), NOT(ISBLANK(Fund__c)) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "RFP_RFI_Questionnaire", NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL(Focus__c, "DD Product"), ISBLANK(Fund__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a Fund when you choose "DD Product". Fund is non mandatory when you choose "DD Corporate"
